title: DecisionJournalRecord
description: One append-only record per decision (including rejections / non-trades). This is the system's durable long-term memory AND its complete audit trail. Records are never edited in place; outcomes are added by appending an amendment event keyed by decision_id (event-sourcing style). Active-trade records are never compressed. Closed records may be summarized into lessons, but the raw journal is retained forever. Each record carries seq + prev_hash to form a tamper-evident hash chain; a break -> DISABLED_REVIEW. Doc: docs/05 Layer 2.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence number. A gap -> DISABLED_REVIEW.

prev_hash.description: Hash of the previous record (hash chain).

decision_id.description: Stable id linking a decision to its later outcome amendment.

event_type.description: What kind of event this record is. (2026-07-03: backfilled guardian_ack/equity_flow/state_overridden - journal.py accepted them but this schema lagged; added catalyst_event/catalyst_triggered for the catalyst pipeline.)

detail.description: Free-text summary for portfolio-level events (halt, regime_change, revisit_set, revisit_triggered).

cycle_inputs.description: Snapshot of the deterministic inputs for full reproducibility / replay.

signals.description: The exact Signal Engine feature record.

core_memory_digest.description: Hash/summary of the Core Memory Block shown to the model.

model_version.description: Both model fingerprints for full reproducibility (the decision spans two models).

llm_proposal.description: The validated TradeProposal (trade_proposal.schema.json), if event_type == proposal/rejected_proposal.

reject_reason.description: Named reason if rejected (e.g. earnings_blackout, granularity_wall, concentration, low_confidence).

sized_units.description: Computed by the Risk Engine, never by the LLM.

client_order_id.description: Idempotency key, generated and journaled BEFORE the send.

outcome.description: Added later via an outcome_amendment event when the trade closes.

reflection.description: Reflexion-style written lesson, added on close. Keyed by symbol + setup_type. Importance is assigned here for retrieval scoring.

importance.description: Write-time importance (a blown thesis / hit stop scores high; a routine win low).
